title: Opening for Category Manager at Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates:
Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates!
